cat_redacted.stdout:
# /etc/systemd/system/callscore-daily-pipeline.service
[Unit]
Description=CallScore daily slow transcript/data pipeline
After=[REDACTED]
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
WorkingDirectory=/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked
Environment=[REDACTED]
Environment=NODE_ENV=production
Environment=HH_READ_API_BASE=https://ops-bridge.call-score.com/api/read
EnvironmentFile=-/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked/.env.hermes
ExecStart=/usr/bin/npm run pipeline:daily -- --write --read-api-base https://ops-bridge.call-score.com/api/read --transcript-limit 25 --transcript-concurrency 1 --transcript-gap-ms 20000 --limit-creators 250 --limit-videos 10 --since-days 45 --extract-limit 50 --match-limit 500 --match-batch-size 100
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=best-effort
IOSchedulingPriority=7

# /etc/systemd/system/callscore-daily-pipeline.timer
[Unit]
Description=Run CallScore daily slow transcript/data pipeline

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 03:20:00
RandomizedDelaySec=30m
Persistent=true
Unit=callscore-daily-pipeline.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

cat_redacted.stdout:
# /etc/systemd/system/hh-control-bridge.service
[Unit]
Description=HH Control Bridge MCP Server
After=network-online.target tailscaled.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=omar
Group=omar
WorkingDirectory=/srv
Environment=HOST=127.0.0.1
Environment=PORT=8787
Environment=HH_TIMEOUT=25
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/hh-control-bridge/smithery.env
Environment=HH_ROOT=/srv
Environment=HH_ENABLE_WRITE=1
Environment=HH_APPROVAL_CODE=0bb3afeb4fd24492b4a4e19c554f98c0
ExecStart=/srv/agents/hh-control-bridge/.venv/bin/python /srv/agents/hh-control-bridge/server.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
NoNewPrivileges=true
PrivateTmp=true

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

cat_redacted.stdout:
# /etc/systemd/system/hermes-worker.service
[Unit]
Description=Crypto Tuber Ranked Hermes worker
Requires=docker.service
After=docker.service network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
WorkingDirectory=/opt/crypto-tuber-ranked
RemainAfterExit=yes
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker compose up -d hermes-worker
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker compose down
TimeoutStartSec=0

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
